result.stdout:
SemanticReleases v0.1.3-79f01fc - Updates assembly versions based on git commit information.
Usage:

  perform
    Updates .NET application versions based on git information

      optional arguments:
        -fb | --fallback : String?  # Version that will be used if it cannot be inferred from git tags. Defaults to 1.0.0
          -d | --dry-run : Boolean? # Performs dry run (no changes).
          -v | --verbose : Boolean? # Outputs additional logging info.

  help
    Displays this help message
